findings.title: SQL injection via unsanitized user input
findings.description: The `userId` parameter is interpolated directly into the SQL query without parameterization.
findings.suggestion: Use parameterized queries: `db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1', [userId])`

findings.title: Uncaught promise rejection in auth flow
findings.description: The `verifyToken` call is not wrapped in try/catch, and the promise rejection will crash the process.
findings.suggestion: Wrap in try/catch and return 401 on verification failure.

findings.title: N+1 query in user list endpoint
findings.description: Each user's profile is fetched individually in a loop. This could be batched.
findings.suggestion: Use a single query with `WHERE id IN (...)` instead of individual fetches.
